prompt: I'm starting a new R package called finchdata that downloads bird observation data from an online API. I want it to meet rOpenSci's standards from the very beginning. Walk me through how to set it up: structure, files, naming, dependencies, docs, tests, and CI. What conventions do I need to follow?
assertions: Recommends usethis to scaffold the package
Says use Imports rather than Depends
Specifies CI across release, oldrel and devel R
Mentions the rOpenSci repostatus README badge
Covers API-key security (env var / keyring / not printed)
